entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., a cool season pulse grown in rainfed agriculture in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research and cultivation of chickpea are focused

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Drought stress occurring at the end of the growing season

entities.name: TERMINAL HEAT
entities.description: High temperatures occurring at the end of the growing season

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: Lack of available water in the soil limiting productivity

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or alleviate the effects of drought

entities.name: INTEGRATED BREEDING
entities.description: A strategy used for developing drought-tolerant varieties

entities.name: TRANSGENIC TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A strategy using genetic modification to develop drought-tolerant varieties

entities.name: NANOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A potential strategy using nano-particles to alleviate drought stress
